serviceNotes.engine oil: CBS oil service MFR 30,000 km / 24 months EU maximum with Long-Life oil (SIB B000214 / service display). 530e PHEV: often 12-month time cap—follow service display and PHEV supplement.
serviceNotes.micro filter: Interior filter at every engine oil change per modular CBS table (garage.wiki F30 LCI 2020; G30 B48 aligned).
serviceNotes.brake fluid: Every 2 years after first change; garage.wiki F30 LCI lists first brake fluid change at 3 years—confirm in manual for market.
serviceNotes.air cleaner element: Air filter each second engine oil service (60,000 km) per garage.wiki F30 LCI 2020 second-oil rule.
serviceNotes.spark plugs: Changed from 90,000 km to 60,000 km: spark plugs with each second engine oil change (garage.wiki F30 LCI 2020 / modular CBS).
serviceNotes.check front brake pads: BMW CBS wear-based reminder. Brake pad thickness should be inspected to ensure safe braking performance.
serviceNotes.check rear brake pads: BMW CBS wear-based reminder. Rear brake pads typically last longer than fronts but still require periodic inspection.
serviceNotes.vehicle check: BMW CBS scheduled inspection. A comprehensive inspection covering braking systems, vehicle diagnostics, and technical components.
serviceNotes.ZF8 gearbox fluid: ZF recommends fluid replacement every 100,000 km despite BMW classifying it as a "lifetime fill." Fresh fluid maintains smooth shifting and extends gearbox life.
serviceNotes.xDrive transfer case fluid: The xDrive transfer case distributes torque between front and rear axles. Fluid degrades under load and heat. Applies to xDrive models only.
serviceNotes.differential fluids: Differential fluids lubricate the gears that transfer power to the wheels. Regular replacement prevents excessive wear, especially under heavy load.
serviceNotes.coolant flush: Engine coolant loses its anti-corrosion properties over time. A flush removes deposits and replenishes protection for the cooling system, water pump, and turbocharger.
serviceNotes.intake carbon clean: The B48 direct-injection engine accumulates carbon deposits on intake valves since fuel is not sprayed over them. Walnut blasting or chemical cleaning around 120,000 km restores airflow and idle quality.

serviceSources.engine oil: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS intervals) — 30,000 km / 24 months EU maximum. https://garage.wiki/bmw/3-series-sedan/sixth-generation-lci-f30/2020/service-intervals.html (G30 B48 modular CBS); https://www.auto-abc.eu/bmw-5-serija/v17649-2017/service
serviceSources.micro filter: https://garage.wiki/bmw/3-series-sedan/sixth-generation-lci-f30/2020/service-intervals.html — interior filter at every engine oil change
serviceSources.brake fluid: https://garage.wiki/bmw/3-series-sedan/sixth-generation-lci-f30/2020/service-intervals.html — first change 3 years then every 2 years; BMW owner's manual G30 520i/530i/530e
serviceSources.air cleaner element: https://garage.wiki/bmw/3-series-sedan/sixth-generation-lci-f30/2020/service-intervals.html — air filter with each second engine oil change (60,000 km)
serviceSources.spark plugs: Changed from 90,000 km to 60,000 km per https://garage.wiki/bmw/3-series-sedan/sixth-generation-lci-f30/2020/service-intervals.html — second engine oil change
serviceSources.check front brake pads: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS brake service); 50,000 km planning interval
serviceSources.check rear brake pads: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS brake service); 60,000 km planning interval
serviceSources.vehicle check: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 — vehicle check every second engine oil service (60,000 km)
